items.question: How do I write good prompts for male moan?
items.answer: Write clear, specific descriptions. Mention intensity (soft, medium, loud), context (pain, effort, reaction), and any style (realistic, stylized). Our male moan generator responds well to detail—e.g. "short male moan after impact" or "layered moaning men in distance." Include mood and length when relevant. The more context you give, the better the result. Try different phrasings to explore variations that match your scene.
